questions.question: What were the three reasons that countries explored and colonized the Americas? (hint: they all start with G)
What route were explorers looking for that would let them sail to Asia to get spices?
Which explorer was one of the first Europeans to explore New York Harbor?
Which explorer sailed up the river in New York that is now named after him?
Which explorer helped France gain influence by exploring northern New York and building friendships with Native Americans?
Which explorer mapped the area around the Hudson River and Long Island, helping the Dutch understand New York?
What animal made Europeans decide to stay in New York in the 1600s?
What were the places where Europeans and Native Americans met to trade with each other called?
What were the buildings that Europeans used to teach Native Americans about Christianity called?
